name: We Are Just Not Divorced
original_name: ただ離婚してないだけ
overview: Masataka works as a freelance writer. He has been married to Yukie for the past 7 years. Yukie works as a school teacher. Masataka and Yuki are not in love with each other. They just haven't gotten divorced. Meanwhile, Masataka is having an affair with a young woman who delivers newspapers. This leads to a shocking situation.

trailers.title: 主演：北山宏光｜テレビ東京 ドラマホリック！「ただ離婚してないだけ」最終話｜2021年9月29日（水）深夜0時〜放送
